Test Scenario: Valid login with correct credentials
Preconditions: User is on /login page and has a registered account
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /login 2. Enter valid email 3. Enter valid password 4. Click Sign In
Expected Result: User is authenticated and redirected to / (home/dashboard)

Test Scenario: Login with empty email field
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /login 2. Leave email blank 3. Enter a password 4. Click Sign In
Expected Result: Inline validation error shown: 'Email is required'

Test Scenario: Login with empty password field
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /login 2. Enter valid email 3. Leave password blank 4. Click Sign In
Expected Result: Inline validation error shown: 'Password is required'

Test Scenario: Login with invalid email format
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /login 2. Enter invalid email format 3. Enter password 4. Click Sign In
Expected Result: Inline validation error shown: 'Enter a valid email'

Test Scenario: Login with password shorter than 6 characters
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /login 2. Enter valid email 3. Enter short password 4. Click Sign In
Expected Result: Inline validation error shown: 'Password must be at least 6 characters'

Test Scenario: Login with wrong credentials shows API error
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /login 2. Enter valid email 3. Enter wrong password 4. Click Sign In
Expected Result: Alert banner appears with API error message such as 'Login failed'

Test Scenario: Toggle password visibility on/off
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /login 2. Enter any text in password field 3. Click the eye icon toggle
Expected Result: Password text toggles between hidden (dots) and visible plain text

Test Scenario: Navigate to forgot password from login page
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /login 2. Click 'Forgot password?' link
Expected Result: User is redirected to /forgot-password

Test Scenario: Navigate to signup from login page
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /login 2. Click 'Create one' link
Expected Result: User is redirected to /signup

Test Scenario: Continue to chat without signing in
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /login 2. Click 'Continue as Guest' button
Expected Result: User is redirected to /chat without requiring authentication

Test Scenario: Sign In button shows loading spinner on submit
Preconditions: User is on /login page with valid credentials ready
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /login 2. Enter valid credentials 3. Click Sign In and observe button immediately
Expected Result: Sign In button becomes disabled and shows CircularProgress spinner while request is in flight

Test Scenario: Submit SQL injection payload in email field
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /login 2. Enter SQL injection string in email 3. Enter any password 4. Click Sign In
Expected Result: Form validation rejects the input with a validation error; no SQL error exposed

Test Scenario: Submit XSS payload in email field
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /login 2. Enter XSS script in email field 3. Submit form
Expected Result: Input is sanitized; no script executes; validation error is shown
